title: AvatarGroup
description: Stacks overlapping avatars showing up to N visible and a counter for the rest. Ideal for collaborator, assignee or member lists.

props.max: Maximum number of visible avatars. The rest are grouped in a +N counter.
props.size: Size applied to all child avatars.
props.radius: Shape shared by all avatars in the group.
props.bordered: Border around each avatar to visually separate them.

slots.default: List of Avatar components. The group controls their size and shape.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Three overlapping avatars without a limit.

maxOverflow.title: With max and overflow
maxOverflow.desc: Limits visible avatars and shows a +N counter for the rest.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: The size is applied to all child avatars.

mixed.title: Mixed
mixed.desc: Combines images, initials and icon fallback in the same group.

types.title: AvatarGroup
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the AvatarGroup component props. Supports max, size, radius, bordered and ariaLabel.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name describing the group of avatars
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive container; child avatars are not focusable
